intro: All food is freshly cooked and prepared in The Alma’s continued Scores on the Doors 5-star rated kitchen.
highlights: Bookings recommended at busy lunch times

menus.title: Lunch Menu
menus.text: Freshly cooked pub lunches, sandwiches, paninis, jacket potatoes, sides and desserts.

menus.title: Pizzas at the Bar
menus.text: Stone-baked stuffed crust pizzas, including vegetarian and meat options.

menus.title: Private Event Buffet
menus.text: Buffet options for wakes, meetings, celebrations and private gatherings.

menus.title: BBQ Event Menu
menus.text: Seasonal outdoor catering for suitable private events.
